high_voltage_cable_systems.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems
high_voltage_cable_systems.description: A wiki page summarizing high-voltage cable systems, including key components and applications, based on a single source.

xlpe_insulation.title: XLPE Insulation
xlpe_insulation.description: Cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) insulation is the dominant dielectric material for modern high-voltage cable systems, enabling reliable power transmission at voltages up to 500 kV. Its superior thermal and electrical properties, combined with advanced manufacturing processes, support design lifetimes exceeding 40 years.

cable_core_components.title: cable_core_components
cable_core_components.description: The central components of a high-voltage cable, including conductor, semi-conductive screen, XLPE insulation, metallic sheath, and outer jacket.

hv_cable_applications.title: hv_cable_applications
hv_cable_applications.description:
High-voltage (HV) cable systems are deployed in a variety of critical infrastructure applications. Modern HV cables, typically using [[xlpe_insulation]], are used for power transmission at voltages up to 500 kV^[8085135b0a96974f:High-Voltage Cable Systems].

## Common applications

HV cables are installed in:
- Underground urban networks, where they replace overhead lines for aesthetic and safety reasons.
- Submarine crossings, connecting islands or crossing bodies of water.
- Connections to offshore wind farms, transmitting power from sea-based turbines to onshore grids.

These applications require careful handling of [[hv_cable_installation_bending_radius|bending radii]] and [[hv_cable_installation_temperature_conditions|thermal considerations]] during installation^[8085135b0a96974f:High-Voltage Cable Systems].

## Storia e revisioni

This page is based solely on source 8085135b0a96974f. No conflicting claims have been identified.

hv_cable_installation_bending_radius.title: hv_cable_installation_bending_radius
hv_cable_installation_bending_radius.description: Minimum bending radius requirements for high voltage cable installation, typically specified as a multiple of the cable outer diameter to prevent mechanical damage and ensure long-term performance.

hv_cable_installation_pulling_tension.title: hv cable installation pulling tension
hv_cable_installation_pulling_tension.description: Maximum axial force allowed on the conductor during high‑voltage cable installation, typically 50 N/mm².

hv_cable_installation_temperature_condit.title: HV Cable Installation Temperature Conditions
hv_cable_installation_temperature_condit.description: Ambient temperature requirements for installing high-voltage cables, including minimum temperature thresholds and rationale.

hv_cable_duct_installation_process.title: HV Cable Duct Installation Process
hv_cable_duct_installation_process.description: The process of installing high-voltage cables within protective ducts, including preparation, pulling, and post-installation procedures.

hv_cable_direct_burial_installation.title: HV cable direct burial installation
hv_cable_direct_burial_installation.description: requirements and procedure for direct burial of high voltage cables, including trench depth, bedding, warning tape, and backfill.

hv_cable_jointing_requirements.title: HV Cable Jointing Requirements
hv_cable_jointing_requirements.description: Requirements for jointing high-voltage cables, including environmental control, preferred joint types, and bay dimensions.

hv_cable_safety_standards.title: HV Cable Safety Standards
hv_cable_safety_standards.description: Safety standards for high-voltage cable work, including regulatory framework, safe working practices, and emergency procedures.

hv_cable_regulatory_framework.title: Quadro normativo per cavi HV
hv_cable_regulatory_framework.description: Quadro normativo che regola i lavori sui cavi ad alta tensione: IEC 61936-1, regolamenti locali e procedure aziendali.

hv_cable_safe_working_practices.title: HV Cable Safe Working Practices
hv_cable_safe_working_practices.description: Procedures and protocols for safely working on high-voltage cable systems, including isolation, earthing, voltage verification, and emergency response.

hv_cable_emergency_procedures.title: HV Cable Emergency Procedures
hv_cable_emergency_procedures.description: Procedures and immediate actions to be taken in the event of a fault or incident on a high-voltage cable system during live operation.

approved_supplier_list_hv_cable_componen.title: Approved Supplier List for HV Cable Components
approved_supplier_list_hv_cable_componen.description: A curated list of approved suppliers for high-voltage cable components, including conductors, insulation compounds, sheathing materials, and accessories, with references to relevant standards and certifications.

conductor_suppliers_hv_cables.title: Conductor suppliers for HV cables
conductor_suppliers_hv_cables.description: Approved suppliers of aluminium and copper conductor rod for high-voltage cable systems.

insulation_compound_suppliers_hv_cables.title: Insulation compound suppliers for HV cables
insulation_compound_suppliers_hv_cables.description: Approved suppliers of insulation compound (XLPE) for high-voltage cables, including Borealis Visico LE4253 and Dow HFDA-4202 EC.

sheathing_suppliers_hv_cables.title: Sheathing Suppliers for HV Cables
sheathing_suppliers_hv_cables.description: List of approved suppliers for sheathing materials used in high-voltage cable construction, including HDPE sheathing compound and aluminium-polyethylene laminate tape.

accessory_suppliers_hv_cables.title: Accessory suppliers for HV cables
accessory_suppliers_hv_cables.description: List of approved suppliers for high-voltage cable accessories, including Prysmian and NKT, with testing, installation, and safety context.

norsk_hydro_aluminium_rod.title: Norsk Hydro Aluminium Rod
norsk_hydro_aluminium_rod.description: Norsk Hydro is an approved supplier of aluminium rod for high-voltage cable conductors, certified to IEC 60228.

aurubis_copper_rod.title: Aurubis Copper Rod
aurubis_copper_rod.description: Oxygen-free copper rod produced by Aurubis AG, certified to EN 13601 and approved for use as a conductor material in high-voltage cable systems.

borealis_visico_le4253_xlpe.title: Borealis Visico LE4253 XLPE
borealis_visico_le4253_xlpe.description: Borealis Visico LE4253 is a peroxide-crosslinkable XLPE compound approved for use as insulation in high-voltage cable systems.

dow_hfda_4202_ec_xlpe.title: Dow HFDA-4202 EC XLPE
dow_hfda_4202_ec_xlpe.description: Extra-clean peroxide-crosslinkable XLPE compound for high-voltage cable insulation, approved by Dow Chemical.

exxonmobil_hdpe_sheathing.title: ExxonMobil HDPE sheathing
exxonmobil_hdpe_sheathing.description: ExxonMobil HDPE compound approved as a radial moisture barrier sheathing for high-voltage cable systems.

arkema_aluminium_pe_laminate_tape.title: Arkema aluminium-PE laminate tape
arkema_aluminium_pe_laminate_tape.description: Aluminium-PE laminate tape supplied by Arkema, used as a radial moisture barrier in high-voltage cable sheathing systems.

prysmian_pre_moulded_joints_terminations.title: Prysmian pre-moulded joints and terminations
prysmian_pre_moulded_joints_terminations.description: Factory-moulded, IEC type-tested joints and terminations for high-voltage XLPE cables, supplied by Prysmian.

nkt_cold_shrink_joints.title: NKT cold‑shrink joints
nkt_cold_shrink_joints.description: NKT cold‑shrink joints are high‑voltage cable accessories for the 66–170 kV range, listed on the approved supplier list for HV cable systems.

iec_62067.title: IEC 62067
iec_62067.description: International standard for power cables with extruded insulation and their accessories for rated voltages above 150 kV (Um = 170 kV) up to 500 kV (Um = 550 kV), covering testing procedures, design requirements, and installation practices.

hv_cable_type_testing.title: hv_cable_type_testing
hv_cable_type_testing.description: Qualification tests per IEC 62067 that validate the electrical, mechanical, and thermal performance of a high-voltage cable system design.

hv_cable_routine_testing.title: HV Cable Routine Testing
hv_cable_routine_testing.description: Routine testing procedures for every manufactured length of high-voltage cable, including high-voltage withstand, partial discharge measurement, and conductor resistance check.

hv_cable_after_installation_testing.title: hv_cable_after_installation_testing
hv_cable_after_installation_testing.description: On-site commissioning tests performed on high-voltage cable systems after installation to verify insulation integrity, sheath continuity, and joint quality.

partial_discharge_measurement.title: Partial Discharge Measurement
partial_discharge_measurement.description: Partial discharge (PD) measurement is a diagnostic test used to detect localized electrical discharges that partially bridge the insulation between conductors. It is a critical routine test for high-voltage cable systems, with a threshold of less than 5 pC, and is also part of type testing per IEC 62067.

high_voltage_withstand_test.title: High voltage withstand test
high_voltage_withstand_test.description: Procedure that applies a voltage above the rated level to a cable system to confirm insulation integrity.

sheath_integrity_test.title: Sheath integrity test
sheath_integrity_test.description: An after-installation commissioning test for high-voltage cable systems that applies 10 kV DC for 1 minute to verify the integrity of the metallic sheath or screen.

joint_resistance_measurement.title: Joint Resistance Measurement
joint_resistance_measurement.description: Joint resistance measurement is an after-installation test for high-voltage cable systems that verifies the electrical integrity of cable joints by measuring the DC resistance across the joint and comparing it to an equivalent length of conductor.

xlpe_insulation_properties.title: XLPE Insulation Properties
xlpe_insulation_properties.description: Key physical, electrical, and thermal properties of cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) insulation used in high-voltage cable systems.

xlpe_manufacturing_process.title: xlpe_manufacturing_process
xlpe_manufacturing_process.description: Processo di produzione dell'isolamento in polietilene reticolato (XLPE) per cavi ad alta tensione, con focus sulla tripla estrusione e reticolazione.

xlpe_degradation_mechanisms.title: XLPE Degradation Mechanisms
xlpe_degradation_mechanisms.description: Primary aging mechanisms affecting cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) insulation in high-voltage cable systems, including water treeing, electrical treeing, and mitigation strategies.

xlpe_compound_quality.title: XLPE Compound Quality
xlpe_compound_quality.description: Quality requirements and properties of cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) compound used for high-voltage cable insulation.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-in.title: High-Voltage Cable Installation Best Practices
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-in.description: This cluster covers the key mechanical, environmental, and procedural requirements for installing high-voltage cables, including bending radius, pulling tension, temperature conditions, duct and direct burial methods, and jointing.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sy.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems: Components and Applications
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sy.description: This cluster groups foundational knowledge about high-voltage cable systems, detailing their core components and primary deployment scenarios.

default.cluster.l1.xlpe-insulation-clust.title: Cross-Linked Polyethylene (XLPE) Insulation for High-Voltage Cables
default.cluster.l1.xlpe-insulation-clust.description: This cluster covers the fundamental aspects of XLPE insulation used in high-voltage cable systems, including its properties, manufacturing process, compound quality, and degradation mechanisms.

default.cluster.l1.hv-cable-xlpe-insulat.title: High-Voltage Cable XLPE Insulation Compounds
default.cluster.l1.hv-cable-xlpe-insulat.description: This cluster covers approved suppliers and specific crosslinkable XLPE compounds used for insulation in high-voltage cable systems.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-ac.title: High-Voltage Cable Accessories and Approved Suppliers
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-ac.description: This cluster covers approved suppliers and specific product lines for high-voltage cable accessories, focusing on pre-moulded and cold-shrink joints and terminations.

default.cluster.l1.sheathing-suppliers-h.title: Sheathing Suppliers for High-Voltage Cables
default.cluster.l1.sheathing-suppliers-h.description: A curated cluster of approved suppliers for sheathing materials used in high-voltage cable construction, focusing on radial moisture barriers including HDPE compounds and aluminium-polyethylene laminate tapes.

default.cluster.l1.approved-conductor-su.title: Approved Conductor Suppliers for High-Voltage Cables
default.cluster.l1.approved-conductor-su.description: This cluster groups approved suppliers of conductor materials—aluminium and copper rod—used in high-voltage cable systems.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sa.title: High-Voltage Cable Safety Framework
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sa.description: A comprehensive cluster covering the regulatory framework, safety standards, safe working practices, and emergency procedures for high-voltage cable systems.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-qu.title: High-Voltage Cable Qualification: Standard and Type Testing
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-qu.description: This cluster brings together the overarching international standard for high-voltage extruded power cables (IEC 62067) and the specific type tests that validate cable system designs under that standard.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-te.title: High-Voltage Cable Testing and Quality Assurance
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-te.description: A cluster of testing procedures that verify the electrical integrity and insulation quality of high-voltage cable systems, from manufacturing through installation.

default.cluster.l1.post-installation-hig.title: Post-Installation High-Voltage Cable Testing
default.cluster.l1.post-installation-hig.description: Post-installation commissioning tests that verify the insulation and sheath integrity of high-voltage cable systems.

default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-co.title: High-Voltage Cable System Commissioning and Installation
default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-co.description: This cluster covers the complete lifecycle of high-voltage cable system deployment, from mechanical installation best practices to post-installation commissioning tests.

default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-li.title: High-Voltage Cable Lifecycle Assurance: From Material to Commissioning
default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-li.description: The complete lifecycle framework for high-voltage cable reliability, from XLPE insulation material science through design qualification, manufacturing quality, and post-installation commissioning testing.

default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-sy.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems: Materials and Accessories
default.cluster.l2.high-voltage-cable-sy.description: This cluster covers the approved materials and accessory components required for the construction and termination of high-voltage cable systems, focusing on XLPE insulation compounds and pre-moulded/cold-shrink joints and terminations.

default.cluster.l2.approved-suppliers-hv.title: Approved Suppliers for High-Voltage Cable Components
default.cluster.l2.approved-suppliers-hv.description: This cluster groups approved suppliers for critical components of high-voltage cables, specifically conductors and sheathing materials, ensuring quality and reliability in cable construction.

default.cluster.l3.high-voltage-cable-qu.title: High-Voltage Cable Quality and Reliability: From Material to Commissioning
default.cluster.l3.high-voltage-cable-qu.description: This cluster integrates the complete quality assurance framework for high-voltage cables, spanning material science, manufacturing, installation, and commissioning testing.

default.cluster.l3.high-voltage-cable-sy.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems: Integrated Design, Supply, and Safety
default.cluster.l3.high-voltage-cable-sy.description: This cluster integrates the foundational components, approved materials and suppliers, and safety framework for high-voltage cable systems.

default.home.title: High-Voltage Cable Engineering Knowledge Base
default.home.description: A comprehensive knowledge base covering the design, materials, manufacturing, installation, commissioning, and safety of high-voltage cable systems for reliable power transmission.

semi_conductive_screen.title: Semi-conductive screen
semi_conductive_screen.description: The semi-conductive screen is a critical component of high-voltage cable systems, positioned between the conductor and the XLPE insulation layer, and also between the insulation and the metallic sheath. Its primary functions are to ensure a uniform electric field distribution, suppress partial discharges, and provide a smooth interface that prevents electrical stress concentrations. The screen is typically made from a carbon-black-loaded polymer compound that is co-extruded with the insulation during manufacturing.
